content.problemStatement:
Chef has a permutationpermutationpermutation P1,P2,‚Ä¶,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1‚Äã,P2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,PN‚Äã of integers 111 through NNN. He needs you to find the value of the sum
S=‚àëi=1N‚àëj=iNgetMin‚Äâ(i,j)‚ÄÖ‚Ää‚àß‚ÄÖ‚ÄägetMax‚Äâ(i,j)‚Äâ,S = \sum\limits_{i=1}^{N} \sum\limits_{j=i}^{N} \mathrm{getMin}\,(i, j) \; \wedge \; \mathrm{getMax}\,(i, j) \,,S=i=1‚àëN‚Äãj=i‚àëN‚ÄãgetMin(i,j)‚àßgetMax(i,j),
where ‚àß\wedge‚àß denotes the bitwise AND operation and

getMax‚Äâ(i,j)=max‚Äâ(Pi,Pi+1,‚Ä¶,Pj‚àí1,Pj)‚Äâ.\mathrm{getMax}\,(i, j) = \mathrm{max}\,(P_i, P_{i+1}, \ldots, P_{j-1}, P_j) \,.getMax(i,j)=max(Pi‚Äã,Pi+1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,Pj‚àí1‚Äã,Pj‚Äã).
constraints: 1‚â§Pi‚â§N1 \le P_i \le N1‚â§Pi‚Äã‚â§N for each valid iii
P1,P2,‚Ä¶,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1‚Äã,P2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,PN‚Äã is a permutation
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers P1,P2,‚Ä¶,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1‚Äã,P2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,PN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer SSS.
